function_reachability: Is it impossible for function 'swap' to reach function 'main'?

Is the loop with condition 'i<SORTSIZE' always executed?

dominators: Does the statement line 20:  <statement> if (A(i) > A(j)) </statement> dominate line 13:  <statement> main() </statement>?

data_dependency: Does variable i at line 18: <statement>   for (i=0; i<SORTSIZE-1; i++) { </statement> determine the value stored in variable j at line 19: <statement>     for (j=i; j<SORTSIZE; j++) { </statement>?

Does the value of variable i at line 24: <statement>   for (i=0; i<SORTSIZE; i++) { </statement> depend on the value of variable j at line 19: <statement>     for (j=i; j<SORTSIZE; j++) { </statement>?
liveness: Is variable 'x' live at the end of function 'swap'?
